test.name: Session Login Test

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://uf17-fdev.unifas.jp/UNIFAS/MS/, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: OSError: Could not find a suitable TLS CA certificate bundle, invalid path: False
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.status: OSError: Could not find a suitable TLS CA certificate bundle, invalid path: False

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Mo # Small delay to release file locks
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Mo # Small delay to release file locks' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Mo # Small delay to release file locks' found.

kw.arg: Mo # Small delay to release file locks
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Mo # Small delay to release file locks' found.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Move File
kw.doc: Moves the source file into the destination.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) No keyword with name 'Mo # Small delay to release file locks' found.
2) Keyword 'BuiltIn.Sleep' expected 1 to 2 arguments, got 3.

test.status:
OSError: Could not find a suitable TLS CA certificate bundle, invalid path: False
Also teardown failed: Several failures occurred:
1) No keyword with name 'Mo # Small delay to release file locks' found.
2) Keyword 'BuiltIn.Sleep' expected 1 to 2 arguments, got 3.
